channel.title: Gguf on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gguf on Arrans github.io

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a cross-platform Flutter app for interfacing with GGUF / llama.cpp models locally, and with Ollama and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: LostRuins/koboldcpp
item.description: A simple one-file way to run various GGML and GGUF models with a KoboldAI UI
